iC2 Clients

Advice CRM Workspace

A focused home for client records, letters, file notes, and adviser administration.

DashboardRecent work, activity, and shortcuts.ClientsSearch, create, and manage client records.LettersGenerate client letters and advice outputs.AdminManage users, licensees, and practices.My ProfileManage your account and personal settings.

Adviser Workspace

Initial shell for advisers, paraplanners, and support staff with role-aware access to follow.

Letters

Letter generation is a core v1 workflow, so this area is reserved for template selection, merge previews, generation status, and download history.

Template-driven output

We can start with basic client letters first, using the existing API and document merge process before we expand toward more advanced advice documents.

Client context

Users should be able to start from a client and arrive here with the record preselected so letter creation stays efficient.

Operational visibility

Generated outputs, failures, and retry options should be visible so staff do not lose track of document work.
